name: document-driven-development
description: Turn a PRD into an approved, project-specific document graph and enforce those documents as implementation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan documents dynamically, then gate implementation on them.
interface.longDescription: Starts from a PRD, discovers the minimum project-specific document graph through dialogue, authors each artifact with explicit approval, and installs repository guardrails based on document hashes, task locks, traceability, hooks, and CI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start from my PRD, discover the minimum document graph with me one decision at a time, and do not implement until I approve the relevant documents.
